MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to ALL COUNSEL AND PARTY(S) IN PROPRIA PERSONA for failure to enter judgment after arbitration award is scheduled this day. Counsel for Defendant Benart Development Company is sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear. The OSC to Deft's counsel is re-set to 2/24/2004 at 10:30 AM, Dept #212 for failure to obtain judgment purs. to 3/12/01 order.
